characters.name: Cad lackey
characters.description: cad lackeyAliasescadOccupationsimon barsinister's henchmenPhysical descriptionSpecieshomo sapiensGendermaleEye colorblackCad Lackeyis the secondary antagonist of Underdog franchise,as well of the 2007 Disney live action filmUnderdog. He is Dr. Simon Bar Sinister’s henchman. Cad serves as Dr. Simon Bar Sinister's henchman and associate, He is first sent out to retrieve stray dogs for Barnsister to use to test his experiments on. Cad picks up a beagle named Shoeshine who used to be a part of the police force. Later he and Barsinister attempt to test a type of genetic experimenting on the Beagle. However, Shoeshine escapes and runs amok in the lab, causing a fire and accidentally becoming exposed to a variety of DNA concoctions and chemicals that Simon developed, which modifies his DNA and gives him the strength to break through the metal door to the lab. Cad then rushes to Barsinister's aid after witnessing the latter injured by a burning TV monitor. Simon then sends Cad out to find Shoeshine. Cad shows up at the door of Jack Unger's house with posters of Shoeshine, but Jack is able to get him to leave without suspecting anything. Later, Simon and Cad find a new lair beneath the city in the sewers. then plan a robbery to get the funds they need to rebuild Simon's lab. Cad leads a band of thugs to rob a jewelry store, Shoeshine intervenes and saves the hostages as well as subdues the two hired thugs, though Cad escapes with some of the stolen goods.

characters.name: Captain Horatio Hunter
characters.description: Captain Horatio Hunter is the titular protagonist of the episode of the same name in the Detective Hunter sub-series. He is an ancestor of Detective Hunter, who, in addition to being a captain in the British Navy, was also the first of his lineage to use the horn. Captain Horatio is a golden retriever dog who wears a captain's uniform in shades of red and yellow, a hat with a feather, and blue trousers with black shoes. Horatio Hunter was a navy captain who dedicated himself to hunting a pirate called the Redbeard Fox. Whenever he needed the help of his crew, he would blow his horn and his men would follow his orders.

characters.name: Captain Horatio Hunter

characters.name: Dirty dog
characters.description: dirty dog is the main antagonist of the underdog comic book "way out west!"He is a dog who owns a ranch and tries to steal land from other farmers. Dirty Dog tries to steal other farmers' land by blowing up a dam and flooding the entire area, but he ends up drowning in the process.Underdog uses a toy tractor shovel to divert the water back into the river, and after that he saves Dirty Dog's life. In gratitude, Dirty Dog stops being evil and transforms his flooded ranch into a fishing spot.

characters.name: Eris Barsinister
characters.description: Eris barsinister is one of the secondary antagonists(alongside with cad lackey)of the steve lambe's underdog reboot.she is simon barsinister's niece who helps him in his evil schemes to defeat underdog and take over the world. Like her uncle, Eris has greenish skin, dark hair, and yellowish eyes with large dark circles.She wears ripped purple rocker clothes with black details, covered in metal studs, and matching boots. Eris is a supervillain who despite being young she is also a very skilled rock star, and like Cad Lackey, her goal is to help her uncle Simon defeat the Underdog in order to dominate the world, but her plans always end up failing in the end.

characters.name: Irving and ralph
characters.description: Irving and Ralph are the main antagonists in the episode "Zot" in the 1964 animated series Underdog. They are a two-headed alien dragon that terrorizes the planet Zot. Irving and Ralph are two-headed green alien dragons with yellow antennae on their heads, and their bodies are stuck together, indicating that they are Siamese twins. Irving and Ralph first appear, crashing the Zots' wedding ceremony and terrorizing the entire kingdom. Underdog confronts them, but the reptilian creature is undeterred and begins to taunt him.

characters.name: Irving and ralph

characters.name: Jack unger
characters.description: Thomas "Jack" Ungeris the deuteragonist of the 2007 movieUnderdog. He is the owner of Underdog. He was played by Alex Neuberger. He is the son of Dan Unger,Having lost his mother some time ago, Jack of course feels lonely and dejected, adding to the fact that Dan has taken a job that allows little time for the two of them to spend together. But as fate would have it, Jack soon discovers that Underdog can talk shortly after Dan brings him home. This turns into an unlikely friendship and it allows Jack to better cope with the loss of his mother and mend the strained relationship between him and Dan. He also has a classmate friend, a girl named Molly who is the owner of Sweet Polly Purebred.

characters.name: Ophelia
characters.description: Ophelia is a minor but quite recurring character in the 1964 animated series Underdog. She is one of the citizens of Capitol City who appears spotting the Underdog flying through the sky. Ophelia is a short woman with blonde hair who always wears a red dress with a red flower hat,white t-shirt underneath and glasses. In most episodes, Ophelia only appears at the end when the citizens of Capitol City spot Underdog flying through the sky and compare him to a bird and a plane, and Ophelia says he looks like a frog.

characters.name: Overcat
characters.description: overcatOccupationruler of planet felina (formerly)Physical descriptionSpeciesalien catGendermaleEye colorblackAppearancesDebutunderdog vs overcatovercat is the titular main antagonist of the episode underdog vs overcat. Overcat is a tall, muscular anthropomorphic cat with grayish-brown fur. He wears a yellow space suit and when he fights the underdog he wears a fighter's outfit. Overcat is a brutally arrogant and spoiled character who thinks he is better than everyone else and who does not accept that anyone else is stronger than him. Overcat is a brutally arrogant and spoiled character who thinks he is better than everyone else and who does not accept that anyone else is stronger than him.

characters.name: Pieman
characters.description: the pieman is the main antagonist of the underdog comic book "underdog meets the pieman","the super-pie and "when you're fat you're fat",he is an evil jester who wants to prove his a better criminal than simon barsinister. The Pieman is depicted in the comic book as a tall man with brown hair and a long nose; he wears a red jester's outfit with yellow details, striped trousers, and pointed shoes. However, in the episode "The Super-Pie," he appears with a different physique, being shorter, chubby, and wearing more glasses and civilized purple clothing.

characters.name: Pirate captain
characters.description: the pirate captainOccupationpirate captainPhysical descriptionSpecieshomu sapiensGendermaleEye colorblackAppearancesDebutforget-me nettheunnamed pirate captainis a minor antagonist appearing in the episodeThe forget me-net. the pirate captain looks like an old,toothless man with a few stands of hair on his bald head,He wears a red hat, a purple coat, with a yellow belt and black boots,he also has a peg leg and wears an eye patch covering one of his eyes. the pirate captian first appears on his pirate ship when he seesUnderdogflying through the sky of the pacific ocean,he immediately orders his men to shoot him down.

characters.name: Simon barsinister
characters.description: simon barsinisterOccupationscientistPhysical descriptionSpecieshomo sapiens/humanGendermaleEye colorblackAppearancesPortrayed byAllen Swift(1964 series)peter DinklageSimon Bar Sinisteris the main antagonist of theUnderdogfranchise. He is a soft parody on Lex Luthor as Underdog is a soft parody to Superman. He sets out to the take over the world to become rich and powerful, an extremely common stereotypical trait of villains. peter Dinklage In the 1964 animated series, he was voiced by Allen Swift. In the 2007 live-action film, he was portrayed by Peter Dinklage, who also played Tyrion Lannister inGame of Thrones.

characters.name: Simon's goons
characters.description: Simon's Goons are a group of criminals who work for the villain Simon Barisinister,They first appear in the episodeSimon says"be my valentine"and made a cameo in underdog's live action movie. The Goons appear in the episode "Simon Says: Be My Valentine," where they kidnap women from Capitol City and deliver them to Simon so he can transform them into giant Valentine's Day cards. They also appear in the live-action Underdog movie, robbing a jewelry store along with Cad Lackey in an attempt to lure the Underdog.

They also appear in the live-action Underdog movie, robbing a jewelry store along with Cad Lackey in an attempt to lure the Underdog.

characters.name: Sweet Polly Purebred
characters.description: Sweet Polly Purebredis a female anthropomorphic dog TV news reporter who is Underdog's love interest, and she often serves as the damsel-in-distress of most episodes. When being pursued by an antagonist, Polly is apt to start singing, "Oh where oh where has my Underdog gone," in a sad voice, hoping for the object of her affections to come and rescue her. Polly's face is slightly similar to that of Underdog's with a large muzzle and nose, and she has platinum blonde hair styled in a pageboy, and her wardrobe consists of a black skirt, a white shirt, a red sweater, and black high-heels. In the live-action film, Polly is a Cavalier King Charles Spaniel owned by a girl named Molly. In a few episodes it is hinted that Polly shows her love for Underdog. In the episode "March of the Monsters" she is caught by a robot and calls for Underdog. He then saves Polly but after Underdog uses his sci-fi noise and breaks all the glass the towns people complain about his noise. However Polly defends the hero and tells the people that they should thank him for saving everyone from the robots. She then goes to reward Underdog with a big kiss but the hero backs away and flies away. Also in the episode "The Vacuum Gun" she is caught by Simon Barsinister's vacuum gun so then she calls for Underdog which her song annoys Simon. Later in the episode she retrieves Underdog's ring. She is based upon Superman's romantic interest Lois Lane. In"The Witch from Picytoon" Polly is a pilot of a plane that crashs in Picytoon a land ruled by an evil witch; Polly is forced to drink a formula that puts her to sleep for a 1,000 years-only Underdog kiss awakens her. In the epsiode "Underdog vs Overcat" after Polly mentions she milked cows as a child she is kidnapped by Overcat and forced to milk all of earths kidnapped cows; In the Simon Bar Sinister Snow gun she is almost turned into a live snowwoman until Cad Lackey has the idea of using Polly to broadcast simon bar Sinister desire to rule the city.

characters.name: Tap tap
characters.description: tap tap the chiselerAliasesunderdog (false identity)Relativesunderdog (possibly long lost twin brother)Occupationdiamond chiselerPhysical descriptionSpeciesdogGendermaleEye colorblackAppearancesPortrayed byGeorge s Irving.Debutthe hopless diamondTap Tapis a minor character inUnderdog. He’s a crooked chiseler. He was voiced by the late George s Irving. He was hired by his old friend Riff Raff to steal and illegally sell the hopeless diamond. In order to do so, he needed to dress as underdog as a distraction. They got rid of underdog by sending him on a wild goose chase. When Riff-Raff was robbing a bank with his henchman Mooch, tap tap, who was dressed as underdog, threatened them with a gun.

characters.name: Underdog (character)
characters.actor_name: Wally Cox (in the animated tv series)Jason Lee (in the movie)(in CGI remake)
characters.description: UnderdogAliasesUnderdogRelativesJack Unger (owner in 2007's movie)Tap Tap (possibly long lost twin brother)OccupationSuperhero(as underdog)Shoe PolisherJack Unger's Pet (In the movie)Physical descriptionSpeciesDogGenderMaleEye colorBlackAppearancesPortrayed byWally Cox (in the animated tv series)Jason Lee (in the movie)(in CGI remake)DebutUnderdog (1964)Underdog(Shoeshine Boy) is the titular main protagonist of both the classic cartoon show, and its 2007 movie adaption of the same name. Breed was unknown in the cartoon, but he is a beagle in the live action movie. Tap Tap (possibly long lost twin brother) Shoe PolisherJack Unger's Pet (In the movie) In the live-action film, Underdog is Heroic, brave, kind, selfless, humorous, adventurous, dependable, and sarcastic. He saves those in need of rescuing from criminals on the street and has fallen in love with Polly Purebred. He cares very much for his family, especially pointing out that he had lost the one thing he cared about: his family rather than his powers. Shoeshine is also best friends with his owner Jack Unger, who is initially the only one to know of his identity as Underdog.

characters.name: Vixa beta
characters.description: vixa betais the main antagonist of the cancelled series,underdog unleashed. vixa beta is a female alien fox that has blue skin, red eyes and long, dark purple hair with white dots resembling stars,She wears a pink spacesuit with shoulder pads, a white diamond on her chest and a crown on her head. appearently vixa beta was originally going to be introduced in the season finale, where she would gather all the villains (including Simon Barsnister, Riff Raff, and Dina-Myte) to defeat Underdog and rule the universe.

characters.name: Wanda pup
characters.description: Wanda Pup is a minor character who appears in Gold Key Comic #20: Super Polly. She is an alter ego created by Polly Purebred to help Underdog fight crime and the forces of evil. Wanda Pup appears as a female dog with long, black hair.She wears a yellow outfit, red boots and cape, and a large white W emblazoned on her chest. After another day of work at the Capitol City newspaper, Polly Purebred sets off to patrol the city as Wanda Pup.During her patrol through the city, she witnesses a bank being robbed and accidentally manages to defeat the criminal.

characters.name: Wanda pup
characters.description: Wanda Pup is a minor character who appears in Gold Key Comic #20: Super Polly. She is an alter ego created by Polly Purebred to help Underdog fight crime and the forces of evil. Wanda Pup appears as a female dog with long, black hair.She wears a yellow outfit, red boots and cape, and a large white W emblazoned on her chest. After another day of work at the Capitol City newspaper, Polly Purebred sets off to patrol the city as Wanda Pup.During her patrol through the city, she witnesses a bank being robbed and accidentally manages to defeat the criminal.
